name: Metro Pawn, LLC
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Doraville, GA offering collateral-based loans, merchandise sales, and gold/jewelry buying with no credit checks required.
description_long:
Metro Pawn Shop is a family-owned pawn business located at 5368 Buford Hwy NE in Doraville, Georgia. The shop has been operating for over 30 years and is run by first and second-generation pawnbrokers with combined experience exceeding 50 years. The business emphasizes its local, independent ownership structure, which they claim allows them to offer competitive rates without answering to regional or national corporate offices.

The company provides three primary services: pawn loans on collateral items, retail sales of pre-inspected merchandise, and direct purchase of items for cash. For pawn loans, customers can bring in jewelry, tools, electronics, musical instruments, luxury handbags, art, coins, and other valuables for appraisal. The loan process requires no credit check. For retail, they maintain rotating inventory including tools, jewelry, electronics, handbags, musical instruments, and collectibles—with new merchandise added weekly. They also operate a precious metals buying service, offering same-day cash offers for gold and other items in any condition. The shop is bilingual and open Monday through Saturday, 10am-6pm.

Metro Pawn differentiates itself primarily through family ownership and stated commitment to competitive rates. They advertise "best rates on pawn loans" and position themselves as the "oldest pawn store in Doraville." Customer testimonials on their website highlight professionalism, friendly service, and lack of "shady dealing." The company has a 4.9 out of 5-star rating on PawnGuru and emphasizes their bilingual staff capability and no-credit-check process.

As a pawn shop, this business model inherently involves short-term, high-interest lending secured by personal property. While the company emphasizes competitive rates and customer service, pawn loans typically carry interest rates significantly higher than traditional loans. The business caters to those needing immediate cash without credit qualification, but borrowers risk losing pledged items if loans aren't repaid. The company's claims about rates being "best" are unverified and typical marketing language for the pawn industry.
address: 5368 Buford Hwy NE d, Doraville, GA 30340

company_info.headquarters: 5368 Buford Hwy NE d, Doraville, GA 30340

pros: No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to those without credit history or poor credit
Family-owned with 30+ years local operating history and combined 50+ years pawnbroker experience
Same-day cash offers available for jewelry, metals, and valuables
Bilingual staff (Spanish/English) available for customer service
All merchandise for retail sale is inspected and verified to be in working order
New inventory added weekly with rotating stock of tools, electronics, jewelry, and collectibles
Rated 4.9/5 stars on PawnGuru with positive customer testimonials regarding professionalism
Multiple service options: pawn loans, retail purchases, and direct item buyouts
cons: Pawn loans carry high interest rates typical to the industry; rates are not disclosed on website
Collateral is forfeited if loan is not repaid by deadline, resulting in loss of personal property
Limited operating hours (Mon-Sat 10am-6pm) may not accommodate all customer schedules
No online or remote loan process described; requires in-person visit for appraisal and transaction
Claims of "best rates" are unverified marketing language without specific rate disclosure or APR comparison
best_for: People needing emergency cash quickly without credit qualification or credit checks
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, tools, electronics) willing to use them as collateral short-term
Spanish-speaking customers seeking bilingual pawn services in the Doraville area
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted tools, electronics, jewelry, and collectibles
diagnosis: Metro Pawn Shop is best for consumers in the Doraville, GA area who need fast emergency cash and have valuable collateral but lack traditional credit or urgently need funds without a credit check. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-interest, short-term debt secured by personal property—failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item, making this a costly borrowing option suitable only for true emergencies.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry, tools, electronics, musical instruments, luxury handbags, art, and coins
Same-day cash appraisals and offers for valuables
Gold and precious metals buying in any condition
Retail sales of inspected, working merchandise
Weekly new inventory rotation and merchandise updates
Bilingual pawnbroker consultation and loan processing
Direct purchase/buyout of unwanted jewelry and valuables
